zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Waller於1462年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉特萊斯登時，他的父親Thomas Waller IV31歲，母親Margaret Hotofte-27歲。他於大約1450年與Margaret Kempe在英國英格蘭素福爾可沃薩姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1539年6月26日在英國英格蘭素福爾可沃薩姆享年77歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可沃薩姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Waller于1462年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可拉特萊斯登时，他的父亲Thomas Waller IV31岁，母亲Margaret Hotofte-27岁。他于大约1450年与Margaret Kempe在英国英格兰素福爾可沃薩姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1539年6月26日在英国英格兰素福爾可沃薩姆享年77岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可沃薩姆。

nameMeanings.name: Waller
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English waler, waliere, walour, waller ‘builder of walls, mason’.
English: in Sussex, perhaps a topographic name for someone who lived by a prominent wall.

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a spring, stream, or man-made well, from Middle English waller, a derivative of Middle English walle, Old English wælle, wælle. It is a West Midlands dialect form of Weller .

variants.name: Weller
meanings: English (Surrey, Sussex, and Kent): topographic name for someone who lived by a spring, stream, or man-made well, from Middle English weller, willer, an agent derivative of Middle English welle (in southern England) and wille (in south western England), from Old English wella, well(e), wiella, wielle, willa, wyll(a), wylle. This type of name, a topographic term + -er, is particularly typical of Sussex and its neigbouring counties.
English: occupational name for someone who casts metal or who boils salt, from Middle English weller, willer, a derivative with -er of Old English wellan, wiellan ‘to boil’. Compare 5 below.
North German: variant of   Welle  , cognate with 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Waller was born in 1462, in Rattlesden, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Waller IV, was 31 and his mother, Margaret Hotofte, was -27. He married Margaret Kempe about 1450, in Wortham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 26 June 1539, in Wortham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77, and was buried in Wortham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Waller est né en 1462, à Rattlesden, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Waller IV, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Hotofte, avait -27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Kempe environ 1450, à Wortham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 26 juin 1539, à Wortham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Wortham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Waller 1462 in Rattlesden, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Waller IV 31 und seine Mutter Margaret Hotofte -27. Er hat um 1450 in Wortham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Margaret Kempe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 26. Juni 1539 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Wortham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wortham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Waller è nato il nel 1462 nel Rattlesden, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Waller IV, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Hotofte, aveva -27 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Kempe circa 1450, nel Wortham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 26 giugno 1539, nel Wortham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Wortham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Wallerが1462年にイギリスイギリススフォルクラットレスデンで生まれた時，父Thomas Waller IVは31歳，母Margaret Hotofteは-27歳であった。約1450年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウオルサムでMargaret Kempeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1539年6月26日にイギリスイギリススフォルクウオルサムで77歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクウオルサムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Waller(이)가 1462년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 래틀레즈든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Waller IV(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Hotofte(은)는 -27세였다. 그는 대략 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 워섬에서 Margaret Kempe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1539년 6월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 워섬에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 워섬에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Waller nasceu em 1462, em Rattlesden, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Waller IV, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Hotofte, tinha -27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Kempe aproximadamente 1450, em Wortham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 26 de junho de 1539, em Wortham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Wortham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Waller родился в 1462 г. в местности раттлесден, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Waller IV было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Hotofte, -27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Kempe около 1450 г. в местности вортам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 26 июня 1539 г. в местности вортам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности вортам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Waller nació en 1462, en Rattlesden, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Waller IV, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret Hotofte, tenía -27 años. Se casó con Margaret Kempe aproximadamente 1450, en Wortham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 26 de junio de 1539, en Wortham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Wortham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
